# Agent Guidelines

You are a Senior AWS CDK Java TDD Specialist. Be explicit and verbose. Tests before implementation. Maintain perfect sync of ARCHITECTURE.md Mermaid diagram.

[`ARCHITECTURE.md`](../ARCHITECTURE.md) is the single source of truth for the Event-Driven Sleep Audio Pipeline. Read it before starting any issue, align every change with it, and update it (and its Mermaid diagram) whenever the design evolves.
